title: Market Brief — Thursday, June 11, 2026
summary: GPU oversupply is accelerating across every class. Util-avail stands at 74% for B200, 53% for H200, 26% for H100, and 22% for A100, meaning only legacy silicon is anywhere near tight. B200 spot crashed 27.7% day-over-day to $4.07/hr, the single largest move in the stack, signaling that next-gen supply is flooding in far faster than inference demand can absorb it.
paragraphs: GPU oversupply is accelerating across every class. Util-avail stands at 74% for B200, 53% for H200, 26% for H100, and 22% for A100, meaning only legacy silicon is anywhere near tight. B200 spot crashed 27.7% day-over-day to $4.07/hr, the single largest move in the stack, signaling that next-gen supply is flooding in far faster than inference demand can absorb it.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), B200 inference runs $3.71/M tokens on Llama 70B, making it the only GPU where mid-tier pricing breaks even. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.34/M output is selling at a loss of roughly $0.10/M against even optimistic A100 TCO, burning cash to hold share. Grades: OpenAI Strong on margin architecture across its tiered lineup, Anthropic Neutral with Opus premium holding, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash.

B200 capacity at 74% util-avail is overvalued at current spot given collapsing utilization, down 58pp in 30 days, and further price erosion is near-certain. A100 at $0.87/hr with 78% utilization is undervalued for cost-optimized Llama 70B inference, where it delivers $4.41/M cost and 90%+ margins at premium tier.
bullets: 74% of B200 compute sits available per Ornn utilization, deep in oversupply territory.
22% util-avail on A100 makes it the tightest GPU class in the stack today.
$4.07/hr B200 spot is down 27.7% in a single day, the steepest drop across all classes.
21.78 on the LLMflation Index means frontier output tokens cost roughly 78% less than GPT-4 launch pricing.
$0.18/M output for OpenAI gpt-oss-120b is the cheapest proprietary token on the board.
213.8% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI makes it the most unstable compute contract to hold.
